response.step_by_step_log: Identified song "caramel ribbon cursetard" via on-screen text. Performed web search for lyrics in Japanese and English. Identified performers as Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina'nis. The original artist credit on screen refers to Mito from Clammbon.
response.global_summary: A musical performance of "caramel ribbon cursetard" by VTubers Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina'nis, followed by a talk segment with them and Mori Calliope.

scenes.description: Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina'nis perform "caramel ribbon cursetard". Title and credits are displayed on-screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ああしたい？ こうしたい？ どうしたい？
まるで死んでるみたい
石の上にも残念！
でもそんなんじゃ
エーアイサーキュレーション
今日やっと始まっちゃうストーリー
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Do you want to do this? Do you want to do that? What do you want to do?
It's like I'm dead
"Even on a stone for three years" is a pity!
But that's not how it goes
AI Circulation
The story that finally starts today
